name: Microsoft/ms-search-parameter-url-length
description: MS FHIR Server-specific SearchParameter.url length cap (from CustomSearchParamTests, split out of Search/custom-search-param.json): a SearchParameter.url of 129 characters is rejected on create, and an existing SearchParameter cannot be updated from a 128-character (at-cap) url to a 129-character url. The 128-character cap is an implementation limit, not a universal FHIR R4 requirement, so all assertions are warningOnly.

resource.name: Fhir262UrlTooLong
resource.description: MS FHIR Server-specific: url is 129 characters, one over the implementation's 128-character cap.

resource.name: Fhir262UrlValid
resource.description: Valid: url is exactly 128 characters (at the MS FHIR Server implementation cap, not over it).

resource.name: Fhir262UrlValid
resource.description: Same resource id as sp-url-valid, but url has been changed to 129 characters — used to PUT-update an existing, previously-valid SearchParameter to an over-the-cap url.

test.name: SearchParameter.url longer than 128 characters is rejected on create (MS FHIR Server-specific)
test.description: A SearchParameter.url of 129 characters (one over the server's 128-character cap) is rejected with HTTP 400 on create (warningOnly: not a universal FHIR requirement).

assert.description: Should return HTTP 400 Bad Request (warningOnly: the 128-character url cap is an MS FHIR Server-specific implementation limit, not a universal FHIR R4 requirement)

test.name: an existing SearchParameter cannot be updated to a url longer than 128 characters (MS FHIR Server-specific)
test.description: A SearchParameter created with a 128-character url (at the cap) cannot then be updated to a 129-character url (warningOnly: custom SearchParameter registration and the length cap are both server-specific, not universal FHIR requirements).

assert.description: Should return HTTP 201 Created (warningOnly: custom SearchParameter registration support varies across servers)

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/ignixa-sp-urlupdate again, this time with a 129-character url

assert.description: Should return HTTP 400 Bad Request (warningOnly: the 128-character url cap is an MS FHIR Server-specific implementation limit, not a universal FHIR R4 requirement)

operation.description: Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-urltoolong (only present if this server does not enforce the 128-character url cap)
Teardown: delete ignixa-sp-urlupdate (only present if this server supports custom SearchParameter registration)
